title: agrostis peckii
intro: Agrostis peckii, also known as Peck's stickgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis peckii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
